highlights: CurXor OS 0.1.0 — Flight Command dashboard with Home hub and nine Claw verticals + The Forge

Simple/Expert UI modes, grouped Claw navigation, Settings hub, and chat workspaces with skill buttons

Kin channel handles route external senders to household profiles; unified inbox on Home and Outreach Claw
Universal experience levels — Beginner, Standard, Expert across all OOTB Claws
Wearables and health devices via user-configured OAuth; MCP tool protocol; Playwright browser automation on eno2

Multi-platform publish desk — 10 live bridges, bridge health, publish recovery, approval + Telegram/Slack operators
Closed-loop growth — engage inbox, analytics recommendations, content planner, library, and campaigns (Standard/Expert)
dashboard_bootstrap API — single-load Creator workspace; tabbed workspace; publish_now; tagged v0.3.0

Send policy — per-mailbox daily limit and stagger between sends (FRE-configurable)
Open/reply analytics on outbound queue; heartbeat process_due for scheduled sequence steps
